GalataCard

FAQ

GalataCard

What is GALATA Card?

GALATA Card is a special discount card that businesses around Galata and Istiklal Street provide to our university students. By showing this card, which is specially prepared for them, our students can get discounts at certain rates from the businesses they receive services from.

Purpose of GALATA Card

Located in the Galata district, we introduce our University to prospective students as a “campus without borders”. One of our main goals is to maintain this vision after our students join our university, to establish a strong bond between our students and our university and to give them a sense of belonging. In line with this goal, GALATA Card offers students both financial advantages and integrates them into the surrounding community.
